name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

## Problem statement

What problem does this solve?

## Proposed solution

Describe the feature you want.

## Why it belongs in core

Explain why this should be in the open-source core instead of a premium module.

## Alternatives considered

List any alternatives you considered.

## Additional context

Add screenshots, links, or examples if helpful.
